name: AudioPlayer

examples.title: With cover art
examples.code:
<AudioPlayer Src="https://www.kozco.com/tech/piano2-CoolEdit.mp3"
             Title="Piano sample"
             Artist="Cool Edit demo">
    <Cover>
        <Image Src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1511671782779-c97d3d27a1d4?w=160&h=160&fit=crop"
               Alt="Album cover"
               Class="h-16 w-16 rounded-md object-cover" />
    </Cover>
</AudioPlayer>

examples.title: Looping + download
examples.code:
<AudioPlayer Src="https://www.kozco.com/tech/piano2-CoolEdit.mp3"
             Title="Looping piano sample"
             Artist="Cool Edit demo"
             Loop="true"
             Autoplay="false"
             ShowDownload="true" />

examples.title: Playback events
examples.code:
<AudioPlayer Src="https://www.kozco.com/tech/piano2-CoolEdit.mp3"
             Title="Tracked sample"
             Artist="Cool Edit demo"
             OnPlay="HandlePlay"
             OnPause="HandlePause"
             OnEnded="HandleEnded" />

@@code {
    private string _lastEvent = "(none)";
    private void HandlePlay() => _lastEvent = "play";
    private void HandlePause() => _lastEvent = "pause";
    private void HandleEnded() => _lastEvent = "ended";
}

mdSummary:
# AudioPlayer

Audio Player component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/audio-player

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| AudioPlayer | Src | `string?` | `` |  |
| AudioPlayer | Autoplay | `bool` | `` |  |
| AudioPlayer | Loop | `bool` | `` |  |
| AudioPlayer | ShowDownload | `bool` | `` |  |
| AudioPlayer | Title | `string?` | `` |  |
| AudioPlayer | Artist | `string?` | `` |  |
| AudioPlayer | Cover | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AudioPlayer | PreloadMode | `string?` | `"metadata"` |  |
| AudioPlayer | OnTimeUpdate | `EventCallback<double>` | `` |  |
| AudioPlayer | OnEnded | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| AudioPlayer | OnPlay | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| AudioPlayer | OnPause | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| AudioPlayer | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AudioPlayer | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `Cover` (AudioPlayer) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `OnTimeUpdate` (`EventCallback<double>`)
- `OnEnded` (`EventCallback`)
- `OnPlay` (`EventCallback`)
- `OnPause` (`EventCallback`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<AudioPlayer />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/AudioPlayer/AudioPlayer.razor`
